# The EA Index

> Independent comparison tool for remote executive assistant services.

## About

The EA Index is a free, independent comparison site that helps founders, executives, and entrepreneurs find the right remote executive assistant (EA) service. We provide real pricing, honest pros and cons, and detailed breakdowns for 22+ EA services so you can stop sitting through sales calls to get basic information.

## URL

https://www.theeaindex.com

## Key Pages

- [Compare All Services](https://www.theeaindex.com/compare): Side-by-side comparison of 22+ EA services by price, model, and fit.
- [Find My Match Quiz](https://www.theeaindex.com/quiz): 2-minute quiz to get matched with the best EA services for your needs.
- [Head-to-Head Comparisons](https://www.theeaindex.com/vs): Direct comparisons like Athena vs Boldly, Belay vs Time Etc.
- [Insights](https://www.theeaindex.com/insights): Guides, pricing analysis, and opinions on the EA industry.
- [Best Tools for EAs](https://www.theeaindex.com/best-tools): Recommended software for scheduling, project management, and communication.
- [Delegation Tactics](https://www.theeaindex.com/tactics): Frameworks and playbooks for working with an executive assistant.

## What We Compare

- Pricing: Real monthly costs, hourly rates, and what is included at each tier.
- Service model: Managed vs fractional vs marketplace vs direct hire.
- Assistant quality: US-based vs offshore, vetting process, experience level.
- Flexibility: Contract length, minimums, onboarding speed, cancellation policy.

## Featured Services

Noire, Athena, Boldly, Time Etc, Double, and 17+ more EA services reviewed independently.

## Content Categories

- Comparisons: Side-by-side service breakdowns
- Pricing guides: What EA services actually cost
- Hiring guides: How to evaluate and choose an EA service
- Delegation tactics: Frameworks for working effectively with an EA
- Industry opinions: Honest takes on the EA services market

## Contact

https://www.theeaindex.com/about
